data.name: My wife is an office manager
data.detailed_description:
My Wife is an Office Manager 💼❤️💔 is an emotional visual novel about love, betrayal and passion.

Your wife starts a new job as an office manager, but soon she is noticed by her charismatic boss and a forbidden romance erupts between them 😳🔥. You stay in the shadows as you watch your life change forever - you become a cuckold💔.

🎯 In the game you will be waiting for:

  • A hot plot that won't leave you indifferent.

  • Vivid CG with the most seductive illustrations.

  • A sexy wife with no inhibitions.

  • A lot of hot scenes and a minimum of boring moments - only passion and drama!

💕Allow yourself to experience new emotions and feel things you weren't familiar with before!🔥

data.short_description: You're a husband who becomes a cuckold while watching your office manager wife get involved in a passionate affair with her boss. Deep drama, hot scenes and your choices that will change everyone's fate. Minimal boring moments - maximum emotion and intrigue!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 339 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 339 MB 可用空間
